title: Build Multi-Event Management Platform with role-based access, team collaboration, and winner management

requirements.text: Implement user authentication with Internet Identity supporting role selection during signup (organizer or participant)

quotes: people have to login or sign up and with the role like participant or orgainizer

acceptanceCriteria: Users can sign up with Internet Identity
During registration, users select their role (organizer or participant)
Role is stored in user profile and persists across sessions
Authentication state is managed consistently across the application

requirements.text: Create organizer admin panel dashboard with event creation, participant tracking, and winner management

quotes: if i login as a orgainizer then open admin panel whose create event in this dashboard make create event section and check how many participant are participate

acceptanceCriteria: Organizers see an admin panel when logged in with organizer role
Dashboard displays event creation section
Dashboard shows participant count for each event
Interface includes winner declaration controls for completed events

requirements.text: Build event creation and management system supporting title, description, date/time, venue/link, and schedules
acceptanceCriteria: Organizers can create new events with all required fields
Events include title, description, date, time, venue or online link
Organizers can add multiple schedule entries per event
Organizers can edit and delete events they created
All event data is persisted in the backend

requirements.text: Implement participant dashboard displaying all available events created by organizers

quotes: if i login as a participant then open participant dashboard this make show all event which is create by this admin

acceptanceCriteria: Participants see a dashboard when logged in with participant role
Dashboard lists all active events
Each event shows key details (title, date, venue/link)
Participants can view full event details

requirements.text: Build event registration system allowing participants to enroll in events
acceptanceCriteria: Participants can register for events with a single action
Registration status is tracked in the backend
Participants cannot register multiple times for the same event
Registration confirmation is displayed to the user

requirements.text: Implement team creation and management system allowing participants to create teams for events
acceptanceCriteria: Participants can create a new team for an event they registered for
Teams have a name and are associated with a specific event
Team creator becomes the team leader
Team data is stored in the backend with member lists

requirements.text: Build team member invitation system with shareable links for email and WhatsApp

quotes: event friends to enroll as a team member this feature make if i want share link through mail and also give whatsapp make this feature

acceptanceCriteria: Team leaders can generate a shareable invitation link for their team
System provides email sharing option with pre-filled subject and body
System provides WhatsApp sharing option with formatted invitation message
Invited users can join the team by clicking the link
Team membership updates are reflected in the backend

requirements.text: Create winner declaration system allowing organizers to mark winning teams after events conclude

quotes: if event is over then how is winner team this winner system make like admin also create this like this team is winner

acceptanceCriteria: Organizers can view all teams registered for a completed event
Organizers can select and mark one team as the winner
Winner status is stored in the backend
Winner announcement is displayed on the event page

requirements.text: Build participant tracking and analytics dashboard for organizers showing registration counts, team formations, and event statistics

quotes: check how many participant are participate

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays total participant count per event
Dashboard shows number of teams formed per event
Organizers can view detailed attendee lists
Statistics update in real-time as registrations occur

requirements.text: Implement notification system for event updates and team invitations (email and WhatsApp mock interfaces)
acceptanceCriteria: System generates notification records for event updates
Participants can view their notifications in their dashboard
Notification includes email and WhatsApp mock sharing options
Organizers can send bulk reminders to event participants

requirements.text: Develop attendance tracking and check-in management system for organizers
acceptanceCriteria: Organizers can mark participants as checked-in for their events
Attendance status is stored per participant per event
Dashboard shows attendance count vs total registrations
Organizers can view list of checked-in and absent participants

requirements.text: Add export reports functionality for organizers to download participant and event data
acceptanceCriteria: Organizers can export participant lists as CSV or similar format
Export includes participant names, teams, and registration status
Reports can be generated per event
Export functionality is accessible from the admin dashboard

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme with a professional, modern academic aesthetic suitable for college event management using a palette of emerald green and warm orange accents on light backgrounds, with clean typography and card-based layouts
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses emerald green (#10B981 or similar) and warm orange (#F97316 or similar) consistently
Typography is clean and readable with proper hierarchy
Card-based layouts organize content logically
Design feels professional and suitable for educational institutions
Visual style is applied consistently across all pages and components

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication instead of JWT
Backend must be implemented in Motoko, not Node.js/Express
All data must be stored in the Motoko actor's stable storage, not MongoDB
Real-time WebSocket features are not supported; use polling or periodic refresh patterns
SMS/WhatsApp integration via Twilio is not supported; provide mock sharing interfaces with pre-filled links
nonGoals: Actual email sending via SendGrid or SMTP
Actual WhatsApp message sending via Twilio

required: Hero banner image showing diverse college students collaborating at an event with laptops and teamwork, modern illustration style (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Icon for organizer role showing clipboard with checklist, flat design style in emerald green (icon-organizer.dim_128x128.png)
Icon for participant role showing people in a group, flat design style in warm orange (icon-participant.dim_128x128.png)
Empty state illustration for events dashboard showing calendar with sparkles, friendly illustration style (empty-events.dim_400x300.png)
